From any page, press the vim-style chord 'g h' (g then h). Confirm the browser navigates to home (/).
Open /help/keyboard-shortcuts (JSON) and confirm the chord 'g h' is listed as the shortcut to home.
From any page, press the vim-style chord 'g o' (g then o). Confirm the browser navigates to your orders (/account/orders).
Open /help/keyboard-shortcuts (JSON) and confirm the chord 'g o' is listed as the shortcut to your orders.
From any page, press the vim-style chord 'g w' (g then w). Confirm the browser navigates to wishlist (/wishlist).
Open /help/keyboard-shortcuts (JSON) and confirm the chord 'g w' is listed as the shortcut to wishlist.
From any page, press the vim-style chord 'g c' (g then c). Confirm the browser navigates to cart (/bag).
Open /help/keyboard-shortcuts (JSON) and confirm the chord 'g c' is listed as the shortcut to cart.
From any page, press the vim-style chord 'g d' (g then d). Confirm the browser navigates to today's deals (/todays-deals).
Open /help/keyboard-shortcuts (JSON) and confirm the chord 'g d' is listed as the shortcut to today's deals.
From any page, press the vim-style chord 'g a' (g then a). Confirm the browser navigates to account (/account).
Open /help/keyboard-shortcuts (JSON) and confirm the chord 'g a' is listed as the shortcut to account.
From any page, press the vim-style chord 'g p' (g then p). Confirm the browser navigates to Prime (/prime).
Open /help/keyboard-shortcuts (JSON) and confirm the chord 'g p' is listed as the shortcut to Prime.
